feature: Calendar tab loads under AUT project with Calendar tab marked active
last_worker_summary: I updated `tests/calendar/page.load.spec.mjs`, replacing the failing `[role="grid"]` + column-header assertions with `getByRole('heading', { level: 3, name: /\w{3} \d{4}/ })` — the evidence-preferred locator for the calendar toolbar month heading (e.g. "Apr 2026") — which directly confirms the calendar view has rendered without relying on a grid ARIA role that isn't present in the live DOM.
